series_metadata.series_description: Materials and information related to internal and external presentations, trainings and workshops developed and/or conducted by Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) staff. Records can include, but are not limited to, presentation, handouts, reference materials used to develop trainings, logistical arrangements, correspondence, copies of contracts, agreements and payment information, evaluations, registration forms, and attendance documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: or material is superseded or revised, whichever is earlier. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: or material is superseded or revised, whichever is earlier
